summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SriSuktam Organics e-commerce website iteration 3. Backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 passed). Frontend shows major improvements with excellent blog functionality, compare products feature, and homepage design. Cart functionality and admin authentication still need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Add to cart button clicks but items not added to cart - cart remains empty after adding products
Admin login process unclear - authentication success indicators not visible after form submission

integration_issues.issue: Add to cart functionality appears to require authentication but no clear feedback provided to unauthenticated users
Admin login success state not clearly indicated in UI - unclear if authentication completed successfully

passed_tests: Homepage loading with beautiful organic food branding and layout
Navigation between pages (products, blog, compare, cart)
Blog functionality excellent - displays 3 blog posts correctly
Individual blog post pages with proper content and navigation
Compare products page structure and UI implemented
Cart page displays correctly with empty state message
All 17 backend API endpoints working perfectly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix cart functionality for unauthenticated users - add to cart should work or show clear authentication requirement. Improve admin login success feedback - users should see clear confirmation when admin login succeeds. Consider implementing guest cart or clear messaging about authentication requirements.
